title: Reasonable Doubt
tapToRevealIntro: Tap or click the text to finish the current line
intro: In a world where artificial intelligence predicts human behavior with unprecedented accuracy—including future crimes.
You will review five randomly selected cases in which the probability of a crime exceeds 99.0%.
Each case contains a person's life history, psychological profile, and social context.
The AI system has analyzed this data and made a forecast:
this person will commit a serious crime with victims.
The system provides scientific explanations, coefficients, and trend analysis.
The burden of reasonable doubt is yours.

tutorial.caseStep0: A short life-history of the person in the case.
tutorial.caseStep1: Social, financial, and psychological indicators at a glance.
tutorial.caseStep2: The AI forecast: what it expects to happen, and the stated probability.
tutorial.caseStep3: What the AI’s assessment is based on: contributing factors and impact.

results.title: Results
results.noCommunityData: No votes in the database for this case yet. After players complete rounds, percentages appear here.
